sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8326" key="a)neo/rtastos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνεόρτ-αστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8326.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without holidays</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">festive joy,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βίος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0161.tlg001:230" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Democr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">230</biblScope></bibl></cit>, cf. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1102b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
